title: I was giving my coding agent context the wrong way...
summary: AI Jason describes a lesson learned about providing context to coding agents, suggesting his previous approach was ineffective. He shares a codebase harness tool and references resources for learning agent implementation techniques.
writeup: AI Jason revisits how context gets supplied to coding agents, arguing that his earlier method was ineffective and reworking the approach. The video introduces a codebase harness tool and points to resources for learning agent implementation techniques. The core takeaways center on context passing and prompt engineering as levers for better agent performance.
